scripts.bump-deps: ncu -u --removeRange --cooldown 5 --cwd code/app/server && ncu -u --removeRange --cooldown 5 --cwd code/app/shared && ncu -u --removeRange --cooldown 5 --cwd code/app/web && ncu -u --removeRange --cooldown 5 --cwd code/doc && ncu -u --removeRange --cooldown 5 --cwd code/bin && ncu -u --removeRange --cooldown 5
scripts.fix: npm run fix --workspaces --if-present && npm run knip && terraform -chdir=infrastructure fmt -recursive
scripts.fix:bin: npm run fix -w bin && npm run knip
scripts.fix:doc: npm run fix -w doc && npm run knip
scripts.fix:server: npm run fix -w server && npm run knip
scripts.fix:shared: npm run fix -w shared && npm run knip
scripts.fix:web: npm run fix -w web && npm run knip
